summary: Completed comprehensive full-stack testing of GetLocal V2 covering 4 test suites: (1) Candidate Voice & AI Pipeline, (2) Two-Sided KYC & Verification, (3) Employer Dashboard & Matchmaking, (4) Schema & API Health. All 18 pytest backend tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed including mobile responsive tests at 375px.

Suite 1 - Voice & AI Pipeline.1.1 Telugu Audio Upload + Whisper+GPT-4o: PASS - Audio uploaded, processed with ai_source=openai
Suite 1 - Voice & AI Pipeline.1.2 Mock Fallback Code Verification: PASS - MOCK_NAMES, MOCK_SUMMARIES, getMockProfile, ai_source='mock_fallback' all verified in code
Suite 1 - Voice & AI Pipeline.1.3 Data Integrity After Processing: PASS - name, experience_years, professional_summary correctly mapped

Suite 2 - Two-Sided KYC & Verification.2.1 Employer E2E KYC Flow: PASS - Create Unverified -> Upload KYC -> Pending status
Suite 2 - Two-Sided KYC & Verification.2.2 Candidate E2E KYC Flow: PASS - Create -> Upload ID -> Pending status

Suite 3 - Filter & Matchmaking.3.1 Filter Education+English: PASS - Only matching candidates returned, no false positives
Suite 3 - Filter & Matchmaking.3.4 WhatsApp Link Generation: PASS - wa.me URL format correct with encodeURIComponent

Suite 4 - Schema & API Health.4.2 Jobs POST Expanded Schema: PASS - All new fields (job_type, work_location_type, pay_type, requires_joining_fee, etc.) stored
Suite 4 - Schema & API Health.4.4 Candidates Manual Entry Stores Field: PASS - education_level, english_level, experience_type all stored

Mobile Responsive Tests (375px)./post-job 3-step form: PASS - Buttons not cut off, all 3 steps render
Mobile Responsive Tests (375px)./hire filter bar: PASS - All dropdowns visible, Verified Only button accessible

UI Integration Tests.Verified Identity Badge: PASS - Shows on verified candidates in /hire page
UI Integration Tests.KYC Gate Display: PASS - Shows upload zone, company name input, skip button

passed_tests: Suite 1.1: Telugu audio upload with lang_code=te triggers Whisper + GPT-4o-mini processing
Suite 1.2: Mock fallback code structure verified (MOCK_NAMES, getMockProfile, ai_source='mock_fallback')
Suite 1.3: Manual entry data integrity - name, experience_years, professional_summary correctly mapped
Suite 2.1: Employer E2E - Create Unverified -> Upload KYC -> Pending
Suite 2.2: Candidate E2E - Create -> Upload ID -> Pending
Suite 2.3: Admin approve employer -> Verified status
Suite 2.4: Admin approve candidate -> Verified status
Suite 3.1: Filter ?education=12th+Pass&english=Good+English returns ONLY matching candidates
Suite 3.2: Filter ?experience=Fresher returns only freshers
Suite 3.3: Filter ?verified=true returns only verified candidates
Suite 3.4: WhatsApp link generation uses correct wa.me URL format
Suite 4.1: POST /nextapi/jobs without title returns 400
Suite 4.2: POST /nextapi/jobs with all new fields stores correctly
Suite 4.3: POST /nextapi/upload-audio without audio returns 400
Suite 4.4: Manual entry stores education_level, english_level, experience_type
Suite 4.5: POST /nextapi/employers without company_name returns 400
Suite 4.6: PATCH /nextapi/employers with invalid action returns 400
Suite 4.7: All API endpoints healthy (GET /candidates, /employers, /jobs)
Mobile: /post-job 3-step form renders at 375px without button cutoff
Mobile: /hire filter bar renders at 375px
Mobile: /admin/kyc tab toggle works at 375px
UI: WhatsApp button href correct format
UI: Verified Identity badge displays on verified candidates
UI: KYC gate shows for new employers
seed_data_creation: Created test candidates and employers with prefixes TEST_SUITE1_, TEST_SUITE2_, TEST_SUITE3_, TEST_SUITE4_ for filter and KYC testing. Telugu test audio generated at /tmp/telugu_test.webm.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 test suites completed successfully. Backend test file: /app/getlocal/tests/test_comprehensive_v4.py. Key test data created with TEST_SUITE*_ prefixes. Telugu audio processing tested with ai_source='openai' result. Filter regression tests verify no false positives. Mobile responsive tests at 375px all pass. Verified Identity badge shows correctly when using Verified Only filter with Show All job filter.
